---
title: "Sounds of Joy"
description: "An interactive sound-mapped collection of 36 mechanical keyboards — click any one and type to hear it."
author: synesis
date: "2026-04-20"
categories: [links, music]
image: cover.jpg
---

![The Listening Museum — preview card showing 36 mechanical keyboards. Image from [sheets.works](https://sheets.works/data-viz/keyboard-sounds).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

[**The Listening Museum**](https://sheets.works/data-viz/keyboard-sounds) — an interactive page that lets you click any of 36 mechanical keyboards (from the 1985 IBM Model M to modern thocky customs) and hear it mapped to your typing.

I've been a faithful user of Apple Magic Keyboards, and I love their low profiles. But I've been obsessed with mechanical keyboards — the low-profile ones. Just haven't found a perfect one I like.
